form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.14) at Broken Hill in a NG, finishing fifth and beaten 5 lengths. Has four successes and three minors from 14 starts from box 1. Looks a key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd over 342m at this track beaten 2.25 lengths (19.81) behind Dayne's Calais in a Grade 4 on March 30. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by a neck at Murray Bridge over 395m (22.72) beating Paducah in Grade 6 on March 27. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when second (16.92) at big odds over 300m at Murray Bridge Straight. Tricky draw to overcome but is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (19.74) in a Grade 4, finishing a 1.3 lengths second. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Should get a clear run from the wide draw. Wasn't impressive last start but does have a great record at this track and distance, last run is a strong form reference. Worth following up.
